[[File:Blue moon spear detail.png|150px|left]]
The '''blue moon spear''' is a non-degradable two-handed [[bladed staff]] that requires level 70 [[Attack]] and 75 [[Magic]] to equip, which is obtained as a possible reward from the [[Lunar Chest]] in [[Neypotzli]]. It can [[autocast]] elemental spells from the [[standard spellbook]], as well as combat spells from the [[Arceuus spellbook]] and [[Ancient Magicks]]. Despite the name, the blue moon spear is not a [[Weapons/Categories#Spear|spear]] and '''not''' considered a [[Corpbane weapons|corpbane weapon]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Break Shackles.gif|thumb|220px|A player performing the blue moon spear's special attack, ''Break Shackles''.]]
The blue moon spear has a [[special attack]], ''Break Shackles'', costing 50% special attack energy and requiring the full blue moon armour set to use.

''Break Shackles'' removes all active binding effects on a target and has a 1.5% increase in accuracy and damage for every [[tick]] of binding removed. The damage boost from ''Break Shackles'' is capped at a 112.5% increase, while the accuracy boost is not capped.

When the special attack is used while casting movement impairing attack spells, the next activation of the ''Frostweaver'' effect will also trigger the special allowing for a 3-hit combo that starts with the spell cast and ends with the melee hit from the ''Frostweaver'' effect.

Although the special attack uses the Fend animation, it actually grants [[Strength]] experience. When automatically performed, this attack can hit targets across diagonal spaces and over small fences or walls.

== Frostweaver ==
When worn with all of the other pieces of the [[blue moon armour]] set, the player gains the ''Frostweaver'' set effect. This gives the ''Blue moon spear'' a chance to melee attack instantly, without any action delays, after the player casts a spell that would bind, freeze or root a target. 

* 20% chance to occur after successfully casting a [[Bind spells|Bind spell]] from the [[Standard spellbook]] or an [[Ice spells|Ice spell]] from the [[Ancient spellbook]], even if it does not bind a target. 
* 50% chance to occur after successfully casting a [[Grasp spells|Grasp spell]] from the [[Arceuus spellbook]], even if it does not bind a target.

This attack can be performed automatically by enabling it in the combat options menu.

==== Strategy ====
An effective strategy is to autocast [[Grasp spells]] from the [[Arceuus spellbook]] with [[Mark of Darkness]] active. This results in a unique dual-combat style where a player gets one instant and free melee attack for roughly every 2 spells that land. This can be particularly effective in PvP encounters with lots of chasing or on monsters with low melee and magic defences.

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 3 December 2025
|update = Sailing XP Review & Further Fixes
|change = The blue moon spear's special attack now only unfreezes NPCs that are legitimately frozen or bound, working correctly on Yama while preventing unintended unfreezing of other bosses.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 30 October 2025
|update = New Renderer Beta Pause
|type = hotfix
|change = * The damage boost from the special attack is now capped at a 112.5% increase (75 ticks).
* The accuracy boost from the special attack is now calculated separately from the damage boost, and remains uncapped.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 29 October 2025
|type = hotfix
|change = The blue moon spear's special attack no longer deals a disproportionately high amount of damage (up to 200) to NPCs that are internally considered 'bound' to prevent them from moving (e.g. phase 3 [[Yama]], phase 2 [[Verzik Vitur]]).
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 24 April 2024
|update = Varlamore Tweaks, GameJam V Commences & More!
|change = The item's weight was increased from 2.267 kg to 3 kg.
}}
